name: Uniswap V3 LP Single-Tick Rebalancing
description: Detect when an active Uniswap V3 LP position has moved outside its tick range (earning 0 fees) and atomically remove + redeploy at the current price ±X ticks. Keeps capital productive at all times.
use_case: Agent has 100k USDC/WETH LP at tick range 2950-3050. ETH moves to 3200. Position earns 0% APR until rebalanced. This skill detects + rebalances to 3150-3250 in one tx. APR resumes.

verification.criteria: Pre-tx position liquidity = X. Post-tx position liquidity = 0. New position minted with non-zero liquidity at new tick range containing currentTick.
